title: Axe Armor Trims
description: Make all axes trimmable with all template and materials, upgrade your axe with more than 1300 different looks !
body:
<details>
<summary>get more trims for your items:</summary>

- Sword trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/sword-trims
- Elytra trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/ks-elytra-trims
- Mace trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/ks-mace-trims
- Pickaxe trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/pickaxe-trims
- Axe trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/axe-trims
- Shovel trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/shovel-trims

</details>



Axe Trims make axes trimmable with any armor trim and any of the 11 smithing ingredients, making each axe type having exactly 199 variants (including the default one) for a grand total of 1393 different looking axes !!!

![axe trims title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/354d567ead2c0cf04e60027622633edfad991404.png)

/!\ make sure to download the resourcepack ( https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/kspack ) if you are using the datapack version or the mod version on a server !!!

![that's a lot of trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/568d862d8fb9282c00a60f98fce9b0852fecb5db.png)

(this is less than 10% of all the axes you can make!)

You can turn any axe from wooden to netherite axe into a unique tool by putting it on a smithing table with any armor trim and any smithing material, and make your axe fancier than ever !!!

![some of my favourites trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8dd8b6302242e2cc38da9a6b09e1d116338067dd.png)

Pickaxe Trims is serverside and fully vanilla compatible, players without the resourcepack/mod will only see a regular axe but players with the resourcepack/mod will see every axe trim !


If you have any issue/question, contact me on discord! (@nugrevan) : https://discord.gg/SxarRKTw8k, any feedback will be greatly appreciated, thanks !


Geyser/bedrock support : @Toxicdust on discord made a port of all the trims datapacks for GeyserMC, since those are not supported on modrinth, you can find it on the [discord server](https://discord.com/channels/1407508835643428988/1441199863831330929/1509831172174118956)
